titleStmt.title: SII 9.389: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 389. (A.R. No. 215 of 1918.) ON A BEAM IN THE MALLIKARJUNASVAMI TEMPLE AT KURUVATTI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1104, Plava, Pushya, ba. 2, Su [kravāra*] corresponding to A.D. 1181, December 25 Friday. It states that while Vikramāditya (II) of the Gutta-vaṁśa was ruling over Beḷuhuge seventy and Beṇṇevūr twelve, his Pradhāna, Susaṅga-Daṇṇāyaka, with the permission of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vijaya-Pāṇḍyarasa, is said to have made, in the presence of Bācharasa and the Mahājanas of Kuṟuvatti, a grant of 70 mattars of land for the service of the god Āhavamallēśvara in addition to the vṛitti-land which had been formerly granted by Vikramāditya, the elder. Lōkābharaṇa received the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ujjanīpuravarādhīśvara guttavaṁśā nva-ya
dyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi . vaṭakalpavṛkṣalāṁchanavijayastaṁbhaṁ vīrāvaṣṭaṁbhaṁ
pannirvvaragaṁḍaṁ pajemeccegaṁḍaṁ maṁḍiḷakabhairavaṁ śrīmadvikramādityadēvar .
beḷuhuge 70 maṁ (beṁ)beṇnevūru 12 manāḷuttamiralu tatpradhānaṁ susaṁgaḍaṇnāyaka
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vijayapāṁḍyarasaranujñeyiṁ be(ṁ)ṇneyūra bācarasamukhya

kuṟuvattiyūroḍeyapramukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa saṁnidhiyalu pūrvva
dalu hiriya vikramāditya koṭṭa sthaḷavṛttisahita 70 mattaru bhūmiyaṁ śrīmadāhava
mallēśvaradēvargge sarvvanamaśyavāgi śaka 1104 neya plavasaṁcharada puśya ba 3 śu
saṁkramāṇadalu . Urvvīśavijayapāṁḍya tadurvviya bācarasanilliyūroḍeya mukhaṁ be
rvvāruvara(ṁ)numatiyiṁ sarvvanamaśyamene paḍeda lōkābharaṇaṁ . pratipāḷakaṁgī dharmma-vakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.389 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
